stemHtml: The strength of the yawing moment caused by an engine failure on a twin-engine aeroplane...

options.a: will be greater when the CG is located at the aft CG limit.
options.b: will be greater when the CG is located at the forward CG limit.
options.c: will be greater when the CG is located halfway between the forward and aft CG limits.
options.d: is independent of the location (fore or aft) of the CG.
